{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"session/update","params":{"sessionId":"ses_0eab83e68ffeUDcwUT711EfGY3","update":{"sessionUpdate":"available_commands_update","availableCommands":[{"name":"customize-opencode","description":"Use ONLY when the user is editing or creating opencode's own configuration: opencode.json, opencode.jsonc, files under .opencode/, or files under ~/.config/opencode/. Also use when creating or fixing opencode agents, subagents, skills, plugins, MCP servers, or permission rules. Do not use for the user's own application code, or for any project that is not configuring opencode itself."},{"name":"init","description":"guided AGENTS.md setup"},{"name":"review","description":"review changes [commit|branch|pr], defaults to uncommitted"},{"name":"roborev-design-review","description":"Request a design review for a commit and present the results"},{"name":"roborev-design-review-branch","description":"Request a design review for all commits on the current branch and present the results"},{"name":"roborev-fix","description":"Use when the user asks to fix open failing reviews, invokes /roborev-fix, or provides job IDs; do not use when the user only pastes review findings with no request to discover or close reviews"},{"name":"roborev-refine","description":"Iterative review-fix loop for the current branch \u2014 reviews via daemon, fixes inline, re-reviews until passing or max iterations reached"},{"name":"roborev-respond","description":"Add a comment to a roborev code review and close it"},{"name":"roborev-review","description":"Request a code review for a commit and present the results"},{"name":"roborev-review-branch","description":"Request a code review for all commits on the current branch and present the results"},{"name":"roborev-review-flow","description":"Use when the user asks to inspect, fix, respond to, close, or iterate on RoboRev reviews for a specific branch or current worktree. Triggers include \"roborev\", \"RoboReview\", \"fix open reviews\", \"close relevant reviews\", \"run branch review\", \"review loop\", pasted branch-scoped RoboRev findings, or instructions to use roborev list/show/comment/close."}]}}}
